title: Butchers and Meat Cutters
description: Cut, trim, or prepare consumer-sized portions of meat for use or sale in retail establishments.

tasks.text: Prepare and place meat cuts and products in display counter to appear attractive and catch the shopper's eye.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap, weigh, label, and price cuts of meat.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, trim, bone, tie, and grind meats, such as beef, pork, poultry, and fish, to prepare in cooking form.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare special cuts of meat ordered by customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive, inspect, and store meat upon delivery to ensure meat quality.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Estimate requirements and order or requisition meat supplies to maintain inventories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shape, lace, and tie roasts, using boning knife, skewer, and twine.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record quantity of meat received and issued to cooks or keep records of meat sales.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Supervise other butchers or meat cutters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cure, smoke, tenderize, and preserve meat.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate with representatives from supply companies to determine order details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
